---
name: New Language Adapter
about: Propose adding support for a new ancient language
title: "[Language] "
labels: language-adapter
assignees: ''
---

## Language
Name of the ancient language (e.g., Rhaetic, Lemnian, Messapic).

## Script System
What writing system does this language use? (e.g., Old Italic variant, Greek-derived, cuneiform)

## Unicode Range
If assigned, what is the Unicode block? (e.g., U+10300–U+1032F for Old Italic)

## Known Corpus Size
Approximately how many inscriptions are known?

## Key References
List the main publications, corpora, or databases for this language.

## Alphabet / Equivalence Classes
If you have preliminary data, list the characters and any known variant forms.

## Your Background
Are you a specialist in this language? Would you be willing to co-author the adapter YAML?
